bottlenecks.growth: 90%+ GMV from consumer buyers with 5-10 year repeat cycle. Trade program with 150k+ designers completely underdeveloped.
bottlenecks.brand: Luxury marketplace brand vs design destination brand. Failed to serve interior designers who buy quarterly.
bottlenecks.campaign: Consumer advertising for low-frequency category. $300 CAC with once-per-decade LTV.

warning_signals: GMV growth near zero after pandemic boom reversed
Luxury furniture purchased once per decade - negative CAC:LTV
Trade Program 150k+ buyers at 10x frequency ignored
prescription: Build trade program as core business. Target interior designers as primary buyers. Reposition brand as design authority not furniture marketplace.

bottlenecks.growth: 15M customers with zero repeat purchase mechanic. Built massive customer base with no monetization path beyond initial sale.
bottlenecks.brand: Data breach of genetic data destroyed trust. Genetic privacy breach is unrecoverable.
bottlenecks.ux: Therapeutics pivot required building drug discovery from scratch — wrong skillset, 10-15 year timelines.

warning_signals: 15M customers with zero repeat revenue mechanic
Revenue flat then declining despite growing customer base
GSK $300M partnership produced zero approved drugs after 7 years
Data breach exposed 7M users genetic data
prescription: Build subscription model converting 5% of 15M customers to $99/year recurring revenue. Position data privacy as core brand differentiator.
